title: aconitum napiforme var. callianthum
intro: Aconitum napiforme var. callianthum, also known as the Himalayan monk's hood or Himalayan monk's hood aconite, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas. It belongs to the Aconitum genus, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aconitum napiforme var. callianthum include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function, although its use should be cautious due to its potential toxicity. Herbal preparations of Aconitum napiforme var. callianthum include tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically used in small doses under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
